meta.title: EmbedPress Live Demo
meta.description: Try EmbedPress in your browser — embed YouTube, Vimeo, Spotify, Twitter/X, Google Slides and more with a single click.
meta.author: WPDeveloper

options.blogdescription: Embed any media in WordPress with one click

steps.data:
EmbedPress Live Demo

Try EmbedPress's one-click embeds for popular providers below. Switch to the Block Editor to see how each block is configured — just paste a URL and EmbedPress handles the rest.

YouTube Video

Vimeo Video

SoundCloud Audio

Spotify Episode

Twitter / X Post

Google Slides

Want more? Open the Block Editor (Pages → All Pages → Edit) to try EmbedPress with your own URLs.

steps.code:
<?php
require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
$existing = get_page_by_path('embedpress-live-demo');
if ($existing) { wp_delete_post($existing->ID, true); }
$content = file_get_contents('/tmp/embedpress-demo.html');
$post_id = wp_insert_post([
    'post_title'   => 'EmbedPress Live Demo',
    'post_name'    => 'embedpress-live-demo',
    'post_content' => $content,
    'post_status'  => 'publish',
    'post_type'    => 'page',
]);
update_option('show_on_front', 'page');
update_option('page_on_front', $post_id);
@unlink('/tmp/embedpress-demo.html');
